title: Melted Gooey Croatian Dough Fritters
description: A comforting Croatian dish featuring deep-fried dough balls with a gooey interior, colored with yellow food coloring, and suitable for a Jain-friendly diet. These fritters are perfect as a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: vegetable oil
ingredients.amount: 2 inches deep in a frying pan

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the sifted flour, yellow food coloring, salt, sugar, and active dry yeast.
Gradually add the warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Cover the dough with a damp cloth and let it rest in a warm place for 30 minutes.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Once the oil is hot, use a cookie scoop or spoon to drop small balls of the dough into the oil, being careful not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the dough balls until they are golden brown and puffed up, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Use a slotted spoon to remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy.
If desired, dust the fritters with powdered sugar before serving.
